case_title: 4-8 JOOST HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION VS HASSANEIN, SAL et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-16-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-03-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLTF. TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO ADD DEFT. FATIN HASSANEIN.
AMENDED CLAIM FILED WITH ADDITIONAL DEFT AND NEW COURT DATE, FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 4-8 JOOST HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASSANEIN, SAL HASSANEIN, FATEN $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,560.00, JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION FEE FOR FEBRUARY, 2006 THROUGH AUGUST, 2006. PLAINTIFF AMEND THE AMOUNT OF HIS CLAIM FROM $2000 TO $3500. ALSO PLAINTIFF ADDED 2ND DEFENDANT ON HIS CLAIM.
